<!-- What's happening vs. what should happen? -->

<!-- What should happen -->

<!-- What actually happens -->

<!-- If known, explain why the bug occurs -->

### Approach

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Bug no longer reproduces with the original steps
- [ ] No regressions in related functionality
- [ ] Unit test added to prevent recurrence
- [ ] Fix works in all 9 languages (if UI-related)

## Risk Assessment
<!-- Could this fix break anything else? What should we watch for? -->
